steps: Send GET /health
Verify HTTP 200 response
Verify response body contains {"status": "healthy"}

features.description: API returns structured error responses with correlation ID
steps: Send a request to a non-existent endpoint
Verify HTTP 404 response with JSON body
Verify response contains correlation_id field

features.description: Application logs structured JSON to stdout
steps: Start the application
Send a request to any endpoint
Verify stdout contains structured JSON log lines with timestamp, level, and message fields

features.description: Playwright recording of target URL produces WebM video
steps: Call the recorder service with a valid URL
Verify a WebM video file is created in the output directory
Verify the file size is greater than 0 bytes

features.description: FFmpeg converts WebM to MP4 and produces clean output
steps: Provide a WebM video file to the assembler service
Verify an MP4 file is produced
Verify the MP4 is a valid video file

features.description: TTS narration generates audio from diff text
steps: Provide a git diff string to the narrator service
Verify a narration script is generated
Verify an audio file (MP3) is produced from the narration

features.description: CLI generates complete MP4 from URL
steps: Run: cd backend && python __main__.py generate --url https://example.com --diff /tmp/test-diff.txt --output test.mp4
Verify test.mp4 is created and is a valid MP4 file
Verify the file contains both video and audio tracks

features.description: GitHub Actions workflow triggers video generation on PR
steps: Verify .github/workflows/pr-video.yml exists
Verify workflow triggers on pull_request events
Verify workflow calls the video generation pipeline
